blended.narrative: Searchmont Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,410 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
